_note: Count Binary item catalog. type: hardware = cyberdeck (enables Jack In), software = matrix warez, skill = chipped skill, misc/key = story items (key items can't be sold).

fletcher.name: Fletcher
fletcher.desc: Compressed-air needle gun. Quiet, deniable, very illegal.

site_maps.name: Site maps
site_maps.desc: Conroy's plans of the Arizona extraction site: bunker, pad, sightlines.

mitchell_dossier.name: Mitchell dossier
mitchell_dossier.desc: Hosaka's biosoft dossier on Christopher Mitchell — career, defection terms, and gaps somebody paid to keep blank.

biosoft_dossier.name: Rudy's scan results
biosoft_dossier.desc: Deep-scan imagery of the lacework grown through Angie Mitchell's cortex. Her father's masterpiece.

hosaka_deck.name: Hosaka portable
hosaka_deck.desc: Corporate field deck. Boring, reliable, faster than it looks.

icebreaker_slab.name: Two-a-Day's icebreaker
icebreaker_slab.desc: Black-market icebreaker in a plain slab. Origin: don't ask. Owner: not Two-a-Day, as it turns out.

jammer_deck_link.name: Jammer's club deck
jammer_deck_link.desc: House deck patch — an old cowboy's rig, kept sharp out of pride.

run_codes.name: Run codes
run_codes.desc: Target coordinates and entry codes for the Barrytown run, hand-delivered through Leon's.

box_dossier.name: Boxmaker dossier
box_dossier.desc: Virek's holos of seven boxes: driftwood, bone china, a doll's arm, night sky in a frame. No two alike. No maker known.

virek_chip.name: Virek credit chip
virek_chip.desc: Untraceable draw on the Virek estate. The kind of money that watches you spend it.

orbit_coords.name: Orbital coordinates
orbit_coords.desc: A strip of paper from a dead man's coat: the cast-off Tessier-Ashpool cores, high orbit, end of the archipelago.

cornell_box.name: Cornell box
cornell_box.desc: One of the boxmaker's works: velvet, brass, a hologram of a face you almost remember. It is worth more than the shuttle you rode up in.

marly_box.name: The boxmaker's gift
marly_box.desc: Made while you watched: a box with rain in it, and a gallery ticket stub, and a future.

jal_ticket.name: JAL shuttle ticket
jal_ticket.desc: Orly to the Freeside archipelago, one seat, no return booked.

medkit.name: Trauma kit
medkit.desc: Military-surplus trauma kit. Everything you need to keep somebody alive who shouldn't be.

hitachi_prop.name: Hitachi holo-projector
hitachi_prop.desc: Consumer holo unit, Barrytown living-room standard. Your mother loved it.

gothick_jacket.name: Gothick leathers
gothick_jacket.desc: Black, studded, smells of hairspray and menace. Passable street camouflage in Barrytown.

skill_biz.name: Street Biz skillsoft
skill_biz.desc: Chipped streetwise: who's buying, who's lying, who's already sold you.

skill_icebreaking.name: ICE Breaking skillsoft
skill_icebreaking.desc: Chipped intrusion technique. No substitute for talent, says everyone with talent.

barrytown_soft.name: Barrytown utility suite
barrytown_soft.desc: Bottom-shelf matrix utilities. Better than running naked. Barely.
